metadata.name: t
metadata.description: Ancient seals have been scattered across the land. Recover them from dangerous dungeons and return them to the altar in Nettlecrest to restore the protective ward.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Nettlecrest
towns.description: A hillside town whose cobbled streets wind between stone cottages.

key_dungeons.name: Sunken Halls
key_dungeons.description: Crumbling pillars mark the way into Sunken Halls. Faint scratching echoes from deep within.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Retrieve the Ivory Key from Sunken Halls
key_dungeons.quest_hint: A powerful artifact lies in the deepest chamber.
